# Third-party Notices

This directory contains vendored browser assets used by `vmaf-viewer`.

## Apache ECharts

- File: `echarts.min.js`
- Version: 6.1.0
- Source: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/echarts@6.1.0/dist/echarts.min.js`
- Project: `https://echarts.apache.org/`
- Repository: `https://github.com/apache/echarts`
- License: Apache License 2.0, `https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0`

The vendored file keeps its upstream Apache Software Foundation license header. The pinned asset is downloaded and verified by `devscripts/fetch_echarts.py`.
